Container.Name: NovaCortex
Container.Overview:
NovaCortex - Semantic Memory System for AI Agents.
Multi-service stack with Web UI, API, SurrealDB, Qdrant vector database, and Redis cache.
IMPORTANT: This template uses Docker Compose. Install the "Docker Compose Manager" plugin from Community Apps, then use the docker-compose.yml from templates/unraid/ in this repository.
Quick Start: 1. Install "Docker Compose Manager" plugin on Unraid 2. Copy templates/unraid/docker-compose.yml to /boot/config/plugins/compose.manager/projects/novacortex/ 3. Set environment variables in the .env file 4. Start the stack from the Compose Manager UI
Default Ports: Web UI on 3000, API on 3001 Default Data: /mnt/user/appdata/novacortex/
Container.Description: NovaCortex is a self-hosted semantic memory system for AI agents. It provides episodic, semantic, procedural and working memory with vector search, knowledge base management, and namespace federation. Includes Web UI, REST API, SurrealDB, Qdrant, and Redis.
Container.Requires: Docker Compose Manager plugin (install from Community Apps). Minimum 8GB RAM recommended for all services.
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: ai memory semantic vector knowledge agent llm

Config.Name: SurrealDB Password
Config.Description: SurrealDB root password (set a strong password)

Config.Name: JWT Secret
Config.Description: API authentication secret (min 32 chars, e.g. use: openssl rand -hex 32)

Config.Name: NextAuth Secret
Config.Description: Session encryption secret (min 32 chars, e.g. use: openssl rand -hex 32)

Config.Name: Redis Password
Config.Description: Redis authentication password (set a strong password)

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: API log level: debug, info, warn, error
